collapse.collapse_definition: Collapse occurs at the first step tau where the recommender fails for collapse_streak_len consecutive recursive update steps to recover any remaining held-out positive item while remaining frontier size remains at least remaining_frontier_floor, within max_horizon_steps.

comparators.acceptance_rule: A comparator configuration is accepted iff control-unit FP is within [equal_fp_band_lower, equal_fp_band_upper].
comparators.availability_rule: A comparator configuration is available only if it can be evaluated on all frozen units under the prespecified admissible windowing rule.
comparators.control_fp_definition: Fraction of control units containing at least one gated alarm.
comparators.nearest_rule: Nearest = minimum distance to the accepted FP band, even if trivial-silent.
comparators.nontrivial_rule: Nontrivial = configuration produces at least one alarm on any unit.

dataset.name: MovieLens-25M
dataset.notes: Canonical public snapshot. Ratings must be chronologically sorted within user before episode construction because released files are not globally time-ordered by timestamp.

engine.notes: Canonical public deterministic item-item collaborative-filtering replay engine for the MovieLens-25M recursive frontier benchmark.
engine.update_policy: at each recursive step append one deterministically revealed frontier hit to observed profile; otherwise append nothing

falsification_rule: The recommender branch fails as a corroborating flagship benchmark if any comparator family achieves an accepted operating point on the canonical benchmark under the same locked equal-FP criterion.

horizon_sensitivity_override.note: Temporary contract override used only to generate adjacent-horizon robustness packet.

notes: Initial canonical recommender benchmark contract freeze.

robustness.rule: Only adjacent horizon sensitivity is canonical for this benchmark: 40, 50, 60 recursive update steps. No other sensitivity analyses are considered canonical at contract freeze.

scientific_purpose: Freeze the canonical public recommender benchmark contract so that dataset identity, recommender engine identity, collapse definition, equal-FP comparator families, and robustness horizons cannot drift during calibration or manuscript preparation.
